# Capital Clean Care

> Capital Clean Care is a licensed, insured, family-owned eco-friendly house cleaning company serving Montgomery County and Frederick County in Maryland, Washington DC, and Northern Virginia. The company has cleaned 500+ homes, holds a 5.0-star rating, and has served the DMV region since 2015 using EPA Safer Choice certified, non-toxic, plant-based products that are safe for kids and pets.

## Services

- **House Cleaning** — Routine cleaning that keeps your home consistently fresh and tidy between deeper sessions.
- **Deep Cleaning** — An intensive, top-to-bottom clean that reaches every hidden corner and neglected surface.
- **Move In / Move Out Cleaning** — Comprehensive cleaning for property transitions; leave or arrive to a spotless space.
- **Post-Construction Cleaning** — Specialized cleanup after renovations, removing construction dust, debris, and residue.
- **Recurring Cleaning** — Scheduled weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning plans with preferred pricing.
- **Eco-Friendly Cleaning** — Non-toxic, plant-based cleaning that's safe for your family, pets, and the planet.
- **Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning** — Fast, reliable turnover cleaning for Airbnb, VRBO, and short-term rental properties.
- **Office & Commercial Cleaning** — Professional commercial cleaning for offices, small businesses, and workspaces.

## Service Areas

### Maryland
Rockville, Silver Spring, Bethesda, North Bethesda, Germantown, Gaithersburg, Potomac, North Potomac, Frederick, Urbana, Clarksburg, Damascus, Monrovia, Takoma Park, Columbia, Ellicott City, New Market, Mount Airy, Kensington, Chevy Chase, College Park, Laurel, Bowie, Wheaton, Boyds, Brookeville, Kentlands, Olney, Hyattsville, Burtonsville, Montgomery Village. Counties served: Montgomery, Frederick, Howard, and Prince George's.

### Washington DC
Washington DC (Northwest and Northeast), Capitol Hill, Georgetown, Dupont Circle, Adams Morgan, Downtown, Shaw, Columbia Heights, and Navy Yard.

### Northern Virginia
Arlington, Fairfax, McLean, Alexandria, Falls Church, Vienna, Tysons, Reston, Herndon, and Annandale.

## Pricing

Pricing is flat-rate (charged by the job, not the hour) and depends on home size, condition, and cleaning type.

- **Standard house cleaning (recurring):** Studio / 1-bedroom apartment $150–$180; 2-bedroom home $180–$230; 3-bedroom home $220–$290; 4-bedroom home $270–$360; 5+ bedroom home $340–$480+. First-time or one-time cleans typically cost 20–40% more.
- **Deep cleaning:** 2-bedroom home $200–$280; 3-bedroom home $260–$360; 4-bedroom home $320–$450.
- **Move-out cleaning:** typically $250–$500 depending on square footage and condition.
- **Recurring discount:** bi-weekly service is typically 10–15% off per visit.

## Why Choose Us

- Licensed, bonded, and insured.
- Background-checked cleaning teams.
- Eco-friendly, EPA Safer Choice certified, non-toxic products — safe for kids and pets.
- 5.0-star rating with 500+ homes cleaned.
- 24-hour satisfaction guarantee — we re-clean the area free if you're not happy.
- Family-owned, serving the DMV since 2015 (9+ years of experience).
- Flat-rate pricing with no hourly surprises.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (240) 704-2551
- **Free quote:** https://capitalcleancare.com/#quote
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
